mapper.insert: INSERT INTO solved_problem_counts (user_id, problem_id, solved_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{problemId}, #{solvedCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE solved_problem_counts SET solved_count = true WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM solved_problem_counts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM solved_problem_counts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND solved_count = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM solved_problem_counts WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM solved_problem_counts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{id}
